throughline: The AI trade flips from disinflation to inflation: Warsh's Fed names AI-infrastructure electricity demand an upside price risk as the Iran ceasefire collapses, oil and the long end back up, and 2026 cuts vanish — yet semis lead because the buildout is the economy
comment: Full reversal of the 2026-06-25 disinflation throughline. Advances running stories with genuinely new developments (Iran now escalation not de-escalation; Warsh's actual first minutes; China AI now capex+custom-silicon not supercomputer; yen now Takaichi-fiscal+JGB-30yr-high). Energy block avoids re-explaining interconnection-queue/behind-the-meter/peak-vs-average (already covered) and leads with new figures: GE Vernova turbine backlog, hyperscaler capex ranges, Chevron-MSFT/Digital Realty/SoftBank deals, TMI-Crane/Oklo, PJM capacity pass-through. Vocab all-new: 一旦, 估计 (register pair with 预计), pasanin (vs pabigat), sigwa (vs bagyo).
